message:
fix: add overflow-x: hidden to main content sections and footer

Prevents residual horizontal overflow on sections that use full-width
backgrounds or animations by adding overflow-x: hidden to:
- #prompts-section main container
- FeaturedPromptsSection wrapper
- ForYouPromptsSection wrapper
- Page footer

This complements the earlier global container width fixes and ensures
no individual section can cause horizontal scroll on mobile.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
